steps.t: Ingmar has asked you to ride a patrol through the Entwash Vale. You should patrol the first point for signs of the Enemy.
Ingmar has asked you to ride a patrol through the Entwash Vale. You should patrol the second point for signs of the Enemy.
Ingmar has asked you to ride a patrol through the Entwash Vale. You should patrol the third point for signs of the Enemy.
Ingmar has asked you to ride a patrol through the Entwash Vale. You should patrol the fourth point for signs of the Enemy.
Ingmar has asked you to ride a patrol through the Entwash Vale. You should patrol the final point for signs of the Enemy.
Ingmar is in the Mead Hall of Eaworth, in the Entwash Vale. You should return to Ingmar with news of your success.
